00001110000000000000000000000001 -> bi: main
00000010100011101000000000111111 -> movi: r29 = 63
00000000100011111000001110100000 -> mov: r31 = r29
00000010000111101111010000000001 -> subi: r29 = r29, 1
00000010100000100000000000000010 -> movi: r4 = 2
00000010000111110111110000000001 -> subi: r30 = r31, 1
00000100000000000001001111000000 -> store: [r30] = r4
00000010100000101000000000000001 -> movi: r5 = 1
00000010000111110111110000000001 -> subi: r30 = r31, 1
00000100000000000001011111000000 -> store: [r30] = r5
00000010000111110111110000000001 -> subi: r30 = r31, 1
00000100000100110000001111000000 -> load: r6 = [r30]
00000000100000001000000011000000 -> mov: r1 = r6
00000000101000000000000000100000 -> out: r1
00000010000111110111110000000001 -> subi: r30 = r31, 1
00000100000100111000001111000000 -> load: r7 = [r30]
00000000100000001000000011100000 -> mov: r1 = r7
00000000101000000000000000100000 -> out: r1
00000010100001000000000000000000 -> movi: r8 = 0
00000000100000000000000100000000 -> mov: r0 = r8
00001110000000000000000000000001 -> bi: main_epilogue
00001110000000000000000000000000 -> ret -> bi 0
